_comment: nginx edge (M12) — a FOURTH EdgeProvider, another dumb data-plane edge but with a third config SHAPE (the nginx brace DSL). crenel does an additive read-modify-write of nginx_config_path: it regenerates only its own '# crenel-managed:' server blocks + the '# crenel-deny:' default_server (returns 444), preserving every unmanaged server block (Authelia, other vhosts) verbatim. Like Traefik it has no admin endpoint to wedge. Seed the file first, e.g.: cp examples/seed-nginx.conf /tmp/crenel-nginx-demo/edge.conf; then: crenel --config examples/settings-nginx.json status
